usage: uiGetRecordObjByInfo [-help] [-layer <string>] [-name <string>] -objType {viaInst sViaInst sWire wire pWire pBlkg} -rect {x1 y1 x2 y2}

options.name: -layer
options.description: Z Value of Layer or Layer Range

options.name: -name
options.description: Name of Object or Net Name of Routing Object

options.name: -objType
options.description: {viaInst sViaInst sWire wire pWire pBlkg} Object Type
